name: Loyalty cashback for churned users
notes: Targeted users with 0 orders in 14 days. 15% cashback on next 3 orders.

name: Dynamic delivery fee by time slot
notes: Reduced fee by 30% in 14:00-17:00 window. Required pricing infra changes.

name: Win-back CRM sequence day 7 + 14
notes: Day 7 push notification, day 14 email with discount code. Automated.

name: Free delivery for first 3 orders new users
notes: Acquisition focused but strong downstream retention signal.

name: Restaurant partner badge (top rated)
notes: Social proof signal. Small but consistent uplift across cohorts.

name: Weekend surge pricing suppression
notes: Capped delivery fee at €1.49 on weekends. Margin neutral due to volume lift.

name: Cart abandonment push notification
notes: Triggered 45 minutes after cart abandonment. Personalised with last item viewed.

name: Glovo Prime subscription free trial
notes: 30-day free trial of Prime unlimited delivery. Highest retention lever tested.

name: Competitor coupon price match
notes: Matched Uber Eats promo codes in real time. Required ops coordination.

name: Personalised restaurant recommendations (ML)
notes: Collaborative filtering model. Best for users with 5+ order history.

name: Double-sided referral bonus
result: +19% new user acquisition at 40% lower CAC
notes: €5 credit for referrer and referee on first order. Viral coefficient 1.3.

name: Flash deals push at 6pm
notes: Time-limited 20% discount on selected partners. Highest open rate: 31%.

name: High-value lapsed user reactivation (CRM)
notes: Segmented by historical LTV. Personalised subject lines +22% open rate.

name: Dynamic basket discount threshold
notes: €2 discount when basket exceeds €25. Threshold personalised by avg. order value.

name: Delivery ETA guarantee with credit
result: +5% NPS improvement, -9% churn in guaranteed cohort
notes: €2 credit if delivery exceeds promised ETA. Builds trust in price-sensitive markets.
